title: SANDBAG LOCATIONS - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY SANDBAG LOCATIONS SANDBAG LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sand and sandbags when there is a risk of flooding. Service details vary by site. 503 Marolf Loop Road Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Residential use only Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week when open Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website for service hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the North Gate. Services: Sandbags/Water Diversion Systems If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
